name: Ecosystem - Flora
description: Wild ecology for vanilla flora on vanilla blocks. v3.9.5: in-game settings UI (U, /ecoconfig) — balance presets, categories, validation; writes ModConfig/ecosystemflora.json. v3.9: Wildgrass integration; VS 1.22 JSON patches. Chunk-fair spread, vines and mycelium, seasonal canopy, tree aging, meadow harvest, inspect (I). Handbook (en/ru).
